# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

imports:
- path: instance.py

resources:
- name: quick-instance
  type: instance.py
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: e2-medium
    sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
    network: global/networks/default
    subnetwork: regions/us-central1/subnetworks/default
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

---
def GenerateConfig(context):
    properties = context.properties

    zone = properties.get('zone', 'us-central1-a')
    machine_type = properties.get('machineType', 'e2-medium')
    source_image = properties.get('sourceImage', 'projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12')
    network = properties.get('network', 'global/networks/default')
    subnetwork = properties.get('subnetwork', 'regions/us-central1/subnetworks/default')
    service_accounts = properties.get('serviceAccounts', [{
        'email': 'default',
        'scopes': ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform']
    }])

    return {
        'resources': [
            {
                'name': context.env['name'],
                'type': 'compute.v1.instance',
                'properties': {
                    'zone': zone,
                    'machineType': 'zones/{}/machineTypes/{}'.format(zone, machine_type),
                    'disks': [
                        {
                            'deviceName': context.env['name'],
                            'type': 'PERSISTENT',
                            'boot': True,
                            'autoDelete': True,
                            'initializeParams': {
                                'sourceImage': source_image
                            }
                        }
                    ],
                    'networkInterfaces': [
                        {
                            'network': network,
                            'subnetwork': subnetwork,
                            'accessConfigs': [
                                {
                                    'name': 'External NAT',
                                    'type': 'ONE_TO_ONE_NAT'
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    ],
                    'serviceAccounts': service_accounts,
                    'tags': {
                        'items': ['http-server', 'https-server']
                    }
                }
            }
        ]
    }
